ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the country is located */,
  "continent" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Primary official language */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the country */,
  "national_emblem" TEXT /* URL or path to the national emblem or flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gdpp" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "exports" REAL /* Value of exports from the country */,
  "imports" REAL /* Value of imports to the country */,
  "inflation" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "health_spending" REAL /* Health spending per capita of the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance (exports - imports) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Central bank interest rate */,
  "labour_force" INTEGER /* Total labour force */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "child_mortality" REAL /* Child mortality rate (per 1000 live births) */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (in years) */,
  "total_fertility" REAL /* Total fertility rate (children per woman) */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Internet usage rate */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "education_spending" REAL /* Education spending per capita */,
  "hdi" REAL /* Human Development Index */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient (measure of income inequality) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "cluster_label_3" INTEGER /* Cluster label for 3 clusters */,
  "cluster_label_4" INTEGER /* Cluster label for 4 clusters */,
  "cluster_label_5" INTEGER /* Cluster label for 5 clusters */,
  "cluster_label_6" INTEGER /* Cluster label for 6 clusters */,
  "cluster_method" TEXT /* Method used for clustering (e.g., K-means, hierarchical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the region is located */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "continent_population" INTEGER /* Population of the continent */,
  "continent_area" REAL /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "continent_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the continent (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file for integrity check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, Markdown) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the readme file for integrity check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
